title: Boardly
description: Boardly - is a modern task management application designed to streamline team workflows. It allows users to create multiple boards with customizable columns, making it easy to structure and adapt workflows to any project’s needs.

title: Cryptonerve
description: CryptoNerve — a high-performance Next.js 16 dashboard delivering real-time crypto market data, live orderbooks, and TradingView charts via WebSockets and CoinGecko.

title: Apple MacBook Website
description: Apple 3D website built with React, Three.js, GSAP, and Tailwind.

title: Polar
description: Adaptive website build with HTML, SCSS, JavaScript.
